---
title: "NCAA Teams"
subtitle: "Browse every college team covered on Classroom to Court — basketball, football, hockey, and baseball"
---

```{=html}
<div class="teams-toolbar">
  <input type="text" class="teams-search" id="teamSearch" placeholder="Search all NCAA teams…" aria-label="Search NCAA teams">
</div>

<div class="sport-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Filter by sport">
  <button class="sport-tab active" data-sport="all">All Sports</button>
  <button class="sport-tab" data-sport="basketball">🏀 Basketball</button>
  <button class="sport-tab" data-sport="football">🏈 Football</button>
  <button class="sport-tab" data-sport="hockey">🏒 Hockey</button>
  <button class="sport-tab" data-sport="baseball">⚾ Baseball</button>
</div>

<section class="sport-section" data-sport="basketball">
<h2 class="division-heading">🏀 Basketball</h2>

<p>Self-contained R/Quarto templates — open the <code>.qmd</code> source, change the team/player/season in the settings block at the top, and re-render to generate a new report.</p>
<ul>
  <li><a href="basketball/grade-team.html">Team Grade Report</a></li>
  <li><a href="basketball/grade-player.html">Player Grade Report</a></li>
</ul>

<div class="team-grid">

  <a class="team-card" data-name="duke blue devils" href="basketball/duke-blue-devils/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#00539B; color:#ffffff;">DUKE</div>
    <span class="team-name">Duke Blue Devils</span>
    <span class="team-meta">ACC</span>
  </a>

  <a class="team-card" data-name="ucla bruins" href="basketball/ucla/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#2D68C4; color:#FFD100;">UCLA</div>
    <span class="team-name">UCLA Bruins</span>
    <span class="team-meta">Big Ten</span>
  </a>

  <a class="team-card" data-name="unc tar heels north carolina" href="basketball/unc-tar-heels/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#7BAFD4; color:#13294B;">UNC</div>
    <span class="team-name">UNC Tar Heels</span>
    <span class="team-meta">ACC</span>
  </a>

  <a class="team-card" data-name="michigan state spartans" href="basketball/michigan-state/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#18453B; color:#ffffff;">MSU</div>
    <span class="team-name">Michigan State Spartans</span>
    <span class="team-meta">Big Ten</span>
  </a>

</div>
</section>

<section class="sport-section" data-sport="football">
<h2 class="division-heading">🏈 Football</h2>
<div class="team-grid"></div>
<p class="sport-empty">No NCAA football teams added yet — check back soon.</p>
</section>

<section class="sport-section" data-sport="hockey">
<h2 class="division-heading">🏒 Hockey</h2>
<div class="team-grid"></div>
<p class="sport-empty">No NCAA hockey teams added yet — check back soon.</p>
</section>

<section class="sport-section" data-sport="baseball">
<h2 class="division-heading">⚾ Baseball</h2>
<div class="team-grid"></div>
<p class="sport-empty">No NCAA baseball teams added yet — check back soon.</p>
</section>

<p class="teams-empty" id="teamsEmpty">No teams match your search.</p>

<script>
(function () {
  const search   = document.getElementById('teamSearch');
  const tabs     = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.sport-tab'));
  const sections = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.sport-section'));
  const empty    = document.getElementById('teamsEmpty');

  let activeSport = 'all';

  function applyFilters() {
    const query = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    let anyVisibleOverall = false;

    sections.forEach(function (section) {
      const sportMatches = activeSport === 'all' || section.dataset.sport === activeSport;
      section.style.display = sportMatches ? '' : 'none';
      if (!sportMatches) return;

      const cards = Array.from(section.querySelectorAll('.team-card'));
      const heading     = section.querySelector('.division-heading');
      const grid        = section.querySelector('.team-grid');
      const placeholder = section.querySelector('.sport-empty');

      if (cards.length === 0) {
        // Sport with no teams yet — always show the "coming soon" note,
        // but hide it (and the heading) while an active search is narrowing results.
        const showEmptySection = query === '';
        if (heading) heading.style.display = showEmptySection ? '' : 'none';
        if (grid) grid.style.display = 'none';
        if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = showEmptySection ? '' : 'none';
        if (showEmptySection) anyVisibleOverall = true;
        return;
      }

      let anyVisibleInSection = false;
      cards.forEach(function (card) {
        const visible = query === '' || card.dataset.name.includes(query);
        card.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
        if (visible) { anyVisibleInSection = true; anyVisibleOverall = true; }
      });

      if (heading) heading.style.display = anyVisibleInSection ? '' : 'none';
      if (grid) grid.style.display = anyVisibleInSection ? '' : 'none';
    });

    empty.style.display = anyVisibleOverall ? 'none' : 'block';
  }

  tabs.forEach(function (tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function () {
      tabs.forEach(function (t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
      tab.classList.add('active');
      activeSport = tab.dataset.sport;
      applyFilters();
    });
  });

  search.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
  applyFilters();
})();
</script>
```
